rationale: Approve a staged normalized Nutrition architecture with a real authorization seam and immutable historical snapshots. Concurrent Pantry/schema work makes an overlapping first write unsafe. The largest reversible package is a comprehensive pure domain kernel plus focused unit suite in two new files: canonical nutrients, vector arithmetic, energy priority/fallback, recipe aggregation, completeness/confidence, target/range/limit semantics, planned versus consumed totals, missing-day trends, and normalized privacy-filtered household comparisons. Re-scout Pantry before persistence, then Judge migration/canonical-food and sensitive-authorization boundaries.

worker_package.objective: Implement the reusable pure Nutrition calculation kernel and comprehensive unit tests without touching current schema, migrations, Pantry, recipe, planner, cooking, UI, docs, or other dirty files.
stop_if: Need to import or modify unstable Pantry, schema, migration, recipe, planner, cooking, UI, or documentation files.
Ambiguity would require inventing medical, personalized target, or authoritative reference values.
Verification fails twice for a cause not fixable within allowed_files.
A live provider call, credential, external write, or paid action would be required.

evidence: Current git status showing concurrent Pantry and unrelated dirty files

parallel_safety.rationale: Only one Nutrition Worker is authorized; another goal already owns concurrent Pantry/schema writes.

missing_evidence: Implemented and verified pure Nutrition kernel
Persistence, authorization, profiles/goals, recipe calculation, allocation/consumption, UI/charts, cross-feature and full-oracle evidence
required_board_updates: Populate T004 from worker_package and activate it.
After T004, re-scout the Pantry/schema state before any persistence package.
Add a migration/canonical-food Judge boundary and a separate sensitive-authorization Judge boundary.
